name: Braised Chicken with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Carrots, cut into 1/4-inch slices (about 1 cup)
8 ounces Broccoli, cut into florets (about 2 cups)
1/2 small Head cauliflower, cut into florets (about 2 cups)
1 tablespoon chopped fresh or dried rosemary leaves, crushed, dried thyme leaves, or dried dill weed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt, paprika, and pepper in a shallow dish.
2. Coat the chicken pieces with the flour mixture.
3. Heat oil in an 12-inch skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
4. Cook the chicken in the hot oil until brown on all sides, about 15 minutes. Remove from the skillet if necessary.
5. Add water and carrots to the skillet. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
6. Simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Add broccoli and cauliflower. Sprinkle with onion salt and rosemary.
8. Add a small amount of water if needed, then cover and simmer for an additional 10 to 20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are crisp-tender.
9. Remove the chicken and vegetables from the skillet using a slotted spoon and keep warm.
10. Stir the sour cream into the skillet over low heat until hot.
11. Serve with the chicken and vegetables.
8 ounces fresh green beans, cut into 1-inch pieces (about 1 1/2 cups), or 2 small zucchini sliced, or 1 1/2 cups frozen green peas can be substituted for broccoli. If using green beans, add them with the carrots.
